Sources: ERB Super Timetable 04_checking 11_20260715_V07_HK239HGCW10_REDO.xlsx, schedule_overrides.json, and class_context.json. The supplemental layer never overwrites a workbook entry. Generated from Excel border styles: solid/medium = confirmed, dashed = unconfirmed.

Class spans

Each capsule is one class, from its first lesson to its last lesson. Repeated cohorts with the same code are separated when the lesson sequence restarts.
